# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore - Overview

## Core Definition
Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is an agentic platform for building, deploying, and operating highly effective agents securely at scale using any framework and foundation model, without infrastructure management.

## Core Services

| Service | Description | Key Integrations |
|---------|-------------|------------------|
| **Runtime** | Secure, serverless runtime for deploying/scaling dynamic AI agents and tools. Features: fast cold starts, extended async support, session isolation, built-in identity, multi-modal/multi-agent support | CrewAI, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, OpenAI SDK, any foundation model |
| **Memory** | Context-aware agents with short-term (multi-turn) and long-term (cross-session) memory with sharing capabilities | LangGraph, LangChain, Strands, LlamaIndex |
| **Gateway** | Converts APIs, Lambda functions, existing services into MCP-compatible tools. Connects to pre-existing MCP servers | Salesforce, Zoom, JIRA, Slack, any OpenAPI specs |
| **Identity** | Secure agent identity/access/authentication management compatible with existing IdPs (Amazon Cognito, Okta, Microsoft Azure Entra ID, Auth0) | Cognito, Okta, Azure Entra ID, Auth0 |
| **Code Interpreter** | Isolated sandbox for agents to execute code (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript) | Multiple language support |
| **Browser** | Fast, secure cloud-based browser runtime for web interactions and form filling | Playwright, BrowserUse frameworks |
| **Observability** | Unified tracing, debugging, monitoring via OpenTelemetry (OTEL)-compatible format | OpenTelemetry (OTEL), CloudWatch |
| **Evaluations** | Automated agent assessment measuring execution quality, edge case handling, output reliability | LangGraph, Strands, OpenInference, CloudWatch |
| **Policy** | Deterministic control using natural language or Cedar policy language | Cedar policy language, Gateway integration |
| **Registry** | Centralized catalog for agents, MCP servers, tools, and skills; governed workflows for publishing/reviewing/approving; hybrid semantic and keyword search | Agent Registry, AWS Agent Registry |

## Use Cases

1. **Agents** - Autonomous apps for customer support, workflow automation, data analysis, coding assistance
2. **Tools & MCP Servers** - Transform existing APIs/services into agent-accessible tools
3. **Agent Platforms** - Enterprise frameworks with centralized observability and governance

## Supported Frameworks
CrewAI, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Strands Agents, LangChain, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK

## Supported Models
Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, Amazon Nova, Meta Llama, Mistral

## Protocols
Model Context Protocol (MCP), A2A (Agent-to-Agent), OpenTelemetry (OTEL), OpenInference

## Integrations
Salesforce, Zoom, JIRA, Slack (via Gateway)

## Pricing
Consumption-based (no upfront commitments or minimum fees)

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-04-12. Registry service now confirmed in core services list. Newly documented frameworks: Google ADK (Google Agent Development Kit).
